title: SOLAS Convention Compliance
description: Comply with International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea.

title: SOLAS Chapter II-1 Construction
description: Apply SOLAS Chapter II-1 construction subdivision and stability standards.

title: SOLAS Chapter II-2 Fire Protection
description: Apply SOLAS Chapter II-2 fire protection, detection, extinction.

title: SOLAS Chapter III Life-Saving Appliances
description: Apply SOLAS Chapter III life-saving appliances and arrangements.

title: SOLAS Chapter IV Radiocommunications
description: Apply SOLAS Chapter IV GMDSS radiocommunications requirements.

title: SOLAS Chapter V Navigation Safety
description: Apply SOLAS Chapter V safety of navigation including ECDIS/AIS.

title: ISPS Code SOLAS XI-2
description: Comply with ISPS Code per SOLAS Chapter XI-2 for ship/port security.

title: MARPOL Convention Compliance
description: Comply with International Convention for the Prevention of Pollution from Ships.

title: MARPOL Annex I Oil Pollution
description: Apply MARPOL Annex I for oil pollution prevention.

title: MARPOL Annex II NLS
description: Apply MARPOL Annex II for noxious liquid substances in bulk.

title: MARPOL Annex III Harmful Substances
description: Apply MARPOL Annex III for harmful substances in packaged form.

title: MARPOL Annex IV Sewage
description: Apply MARPOL Annex IV for sewage from ships.

title: MARPOL Annex V Garbage
description: Apply MARPOL Annex V for garbage from ships.

title: MARPOL Annex VI Air Pollution
description: Apply MARPOL Annex VI for air pollution including sulphur cap and EEDI.

title: EEDI Requirements
description: Meet IMO Energy Efficiency Design Index for new ships.

title: EEXI Requirements
description: Meet IMO Energy Efficiency Existing Ship Index for in-service ships.

title: Carbon Intensity Indicator
description: Calculate annual CII rating per MARPOL Annex VI Chapter 5.

title: Maritime Labour Convention 2006
description: Comply with MLC 2006 minimum requirements for seafarers.

title: MLC Wages and Hours of Rest
description: Apply MLC 2006 standards for seafarer wages, hours of work, and rest.

title: STCW Convention
description: Comply with STCW for seafarer training, certification, and watchkeeping.

title: ISM Code Compliance
description: Maintain ISM Code Document of Compliance and Safety Management Certificate.

title: ISPS Code Ship Security
description: Implement Ship Security Plan and maintain International Ship Security Certificate.

title: International Tonnage Convention
description: Apply International Convention on Tonnage Measurement of Ships 1969.

title: COLREG Navigation Rules
description: Apply Convention on the International Regulations for Preventing Collisions at Sea.

title: Ballast Water Management Convention
description: Comply with BWM Convention 2004 for ballast water treatment.

title: Anti-Fouling Systems Convention
description: Comply with AFS Convention prohibiting harmful anti-fouling systems.

title: Hong Kong Ship Recycling Convention
description: Apply Hong Kong Convention for safe ship recycling.

title: Polar Code Compliance
description: Comply with Polar Code for ships operating in Arctic/Antarctic waters.

title: USCG Compliance
description: Comply with USCG regulations for ships operating in US waters.

title: Oil Pollution Act of 1990
description: Comply with OPA 90 for oil spill prevention and response.

title: USCG Certificate of Documentation
description: Obtain USCG Certificate of Documentation for US-flag vessels.

title: USCG Tonnage Survey
description: Maintain USCG tonnage survey for US documented vessels.

title: EPA Vessel General Permit
description: Comply with EPA Vessel General Permit for incidental discharges.

title: Jones Act Cabotage
description: Apply Jones Act for cabotage in US waters (US-built/owned/crewed).

title: Particularly Sensitive Sea Areas
description: Apply IMO PSSA designations for sensitive marine areas.

title: EU MRV Maritime Emissions
description: Monitor, report, and verify CO2 emissions per EU MRV Regulation.

title: EU ETS Maritime
description: Comply with EU ETS for maritime sector since 2024.

title: FuelEU Maritime Regulation
description: Comply with FuelEU Maritime for alternative fuel use.

title: IMO Maritime Cyber Risk Management
description: Implement IMO Resolution MSC.428(98) cyber risk management.

title: BIMCO Cyber Security Clauses
description: Apply BIMCO Cyber Security Clauses in shipping contracts.

title: OFAC Vessel Screening
description: Screen vessels and cargo against OFAC SDN list.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international shipping.

title: UK Bribery Act Compliance
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery.

title: ISGOTT Tanker Safety Guide
description: Apply International Safety Guide for Oil Tankers and Terminals.

title: OCIMF Tanker Management Self-Assessment
description: Apply OCIMF TMSA for tanker management.

title: IACS Class Society Rules
description: Maintain class with an IACS member society for vessel construction/maintenance.

title: Port State Control Compliance
description: Maintain compliance with Port State Control inspection regimes (Paris/Tokyo/USCG).

title: Flag State Requirements
description: Comply with flag state administration requirements.

title: Liability Conventions
description: Apply LLMC 1976/96 and Athens Convention liability limits.

title: P&I Insurance
description: Maintain Protection and Indemnity insurance through IG club.

title: Hull and Machinery Insurance
description: Maintain Hull and Machinery insurance for vessels.

title: Standard Charter Parties
description: Use standardized BIMCO charter parties for commercial contracts.

title: Bill of Lading Compliance
description: Issue compliant bills of lading per Hague-Visby Rules.

title: Incoterms 2020
description: Apply Incoterms 2020 for maritime cargo transactions.

title: FAL Convention
description: Apply Convention on Facilitation of International Maritime Traffic.

title: AES Filing for Cargo
description: File EEI through AES for required US cargo exports.

title: Importer Security Filing 10+2
description: File ISF 10+2 for ocean shipments to US per CBP.

title: EU ENS Filing
description: File Entry Summary Declaration for shipments entering EU per UCC.

title: C-TPAT Trade Partner Security
description: Maintain C-TPAT certification for supply chain security.

title: EU Authorized Economic Operator
description: Maintain AEO status for EU customs simplifications.

title: ISO 28000 Supply Chain Security
description: Implement supply chain security management per ISO 28000.

title: Lawful Basis for Crew Data
description: Document lawful basis for maritime crew personal data processing.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Crew Data Transfers
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for crew data transfers outside EEA.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Maritime ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for shipping operations and OT systems.

title: IEC 62443 OT Cybersecurity
description: Apply IEC 62443 to maritime OT systems including ECDIS / engine controls.

title: TSA Maritime Security Programs
description: Apply TSA maritime security programs for US ports.

title: Maritime Transportation Security Act
description: Comply with MTSA for vessel and facility security.

title: Notice of Voluntary Departure Reports
description: File NVDRs per USCG Operations.

title: Transportation Worker Identification Credential
description: Maintain TWIC credentials for personnel with unescorted access to secure port areas.

title: 24-Hour Manifest Rule
description: File 24-Hour Advance Manifest per CBP for inbound shipments.

title: GISIS Reporting
description: Submit data to IMO Global Integrated Shipping Information System.

title: Lloyd's Open Form Salvage
description: Apply Lloyd's Open Form 2020 for salvage agreements.

title: Nairobi Wreck Removal Convention
description: Apply Nairobi International Convention on Removal of Wrecks.

title: Athens Convention Passenger Liability
description: Apply Athens Convention 2002 for passenger and luggage liability.

title: EU Passenger Rights Regulation
description: Comply with EU Regulation 1177/2010 for ship passenger rights.

title: 0.5% Global Sulphur Cap
description: Comply with 0.5% global sulphur cap on marine fuels (0.10% in ECAs).

title: ISO 19030 Ship Performance
description: Apply ISO 19030 for ship performance assessment.

title: ISO 50001 Maritime Energy Management
description: Establish EnMS per ISO 50001 for fleet energy efficiency.

title: ISO 14001 Maritime EMS
description: Establish EMS per ISO 14001 for fleet environmental management.

title: ISO 45001 Maritime OHSMS
description: Establish OHSMS per ISO 45001 for crew safety beyond SOLAS/STCW.

title: ISO 9001 QMS
description: Establish QMS per ISO 9001 for shipping operations.

title: Maritime Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS per ISO 22301 for fleet operations continuity.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK maritime operations.

title: UFLPA Forced Labor Cargo
description: Verify cargo does not include Xinjiang-produced goods per UFLPA.

title: EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence
description: Comply with EU CSDDD for supply chain due diligence.

title: BMP5 Anti-Piracy
description: Apply BMP5 Best Management Practices for ship protection from piracy.

title: ECDIS Mandatory Carriage
description: Carry approved ECDIS per SOLAS V/19 phased implementation.

title: AIS Mandatory Carriage
description: Carry AIS per SOLAS V/19 for ships ≥300 GT.

title: VDR Voyage Data Recorder
description: Carry VDR per SOLAS V/20 for new and existing ships.

title: EU AI Act for Maritime AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations for autonomous vessel AI.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: Maritime Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering OT/IT and ECDIS-related incidents.

title: FATCA Reporting
description: Apply FATCA reporting where maritime banking operations exist.

title: BSA AML for Maritime Operations
description: Apply BSA AML to maritime banking operations.

title: EU Ship Recycling Regulation
description: Comply with EU Ship Recycling Regulation 1257/2013.

title: SOPEP Plan
description: Maintain Shipboard Oil Pollution Emergency Plan per MARPOL Annex I Reg 37.

title: BWM D-2 Performance Standard
description: Meet BWM D-2 ballast water performance standard.
